title: Layer VI -- Conflict and Repair
description: Build 6 governance skills for NEOS Layer VI: harm-circle, nvc-dialogue, repair-agreement, escalation-triage, coaching-intervention, and community-impact-assessment. Grounded in Transformative Justice, Restorative Justice, NVC, and Ostrom's accessible conflict resolution principle. OmniOne's Solutionary Culture as inline example.
